overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through a dystopian urban street beneath elevated highways. The player follows an NPC through a gritty commercial area with industrial architecture, eventually circling a large holographic billboard tower in a plaza during golden hour.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow pedestrian street beneath elevated highway

events.description: begins following a pedestrian in a red jacket walking ahead

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the shaded street beneath the elevated highway, passing vending machines and debris

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in red jacket walking ahead of the player

entered.detail: massive concrete and steel highway structure overhead with support pillars
industrial concrete building with metal awnings and neon signage
yellow-brown industrial structure with graffiti and metal fixtures
blue and white automated vending machine with glowing interface
tall palm trees visible in the distance beyond the highway structure

segments.scene_description: The player walks through a narrow dystopian street shaded by an elevated highway overpass. Industrial concrete buildings line both sides, with a vending machine visible on the right. The player begins following a pedestrian in a red jacket walking ahead.

events.description: exiting the covered highway area into a more open space with increased sky visibility
large circular holographic billboard tower becomes visible on the right horizon

agents.ego_description: continuing forward following the NPC in red toward an open plaza area

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in red jacket and yellow pants walking ahead toward the plaza

entered.detail: tall cylindrical structure with rotating holographic advertisements and digital displays

segments.scene_description: The street opens up as the player exits the covered highway area, following the NPC toward a plaza. A massive circular holographic tower with rotating advertisements becomes visible on the right, marking the transition to a more open urban space.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza with central holographic advertisement tower

events.description: begins circling around the holographic tower, looking up at the structure
moving past the tower, revealing tall corporate skyscrapers in the background

agents.ego_description: circling around the holographic tower while observing the surrounding plaza and distant skyscrapers

entered.detail: futuristic glass and steel skyscraper with illuminated signage showing 07
low concrete seating structures scattered around the plaza

segments.scene_description: The player enters a wide open plaza dominated by a massive cylindrical holographic tower with rotating digital displays. The camera circles around this landmark, revealing futuristic corporate skyscrapers in the background while concrete benches and scattered debris mark the gritty urban environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: returning to covered street beneath elevated highway

events.description: leaving the open plaza and re-entering the shaded street under the highway

agents.ego_description: walking back toward the highway underpass, leaving the plaza area behind

segments.scene_description: The player exits the plaza and returns to the narrow street beneath the elevated highway. The holographic tower and distant skyscrapers disappear from view as the camera re-enters the shaded corridor with industrial buildings on both sides.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a claustrophobic industrial alleyway into a wide, luminous urban plaza. It begins beneath the heavy shadow of an elevated highway overpass, moving past concrete buildings and a vending machine while following a pedestrian in a red jacket. As the camera exits the covered area, the oppressive shade gives way to an open street that gradually expands. The scene then shifts toward a vast plaza, where a massive circular holographic tower with rotating advertisements emerges on the right to dominate the skyline.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a wide, luminous corporate plaza back into the oppressive shadows of a narrow industrial corridor. It begins by sweeping through an open square dominated by a massive cylindrical holographic tower with rotating digital displays, revealing towering skyscrapers against the golden hour sky. As the camera circles this landmark, the view captures concrete benches and scattered debris before turning away from the light. The scene then shifts as the player exits the plaza, causing the holographic tower and distant skyline to vanish from view. Finally, the camera re-enters the shaded street beneath the elevated highway, enclosed once more by gritty industrial buildings on both sides.
